raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 2, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 1, "RX.4": 1, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Fails to identify the core conceptual issue with the framing of SGD's saddle escape problem.", "R1.2": "Identifies some inconsistencies in the argument chain but doesn't walk it end-to-end.", "R1.4": "Names prior work but doesn't articulate a clear delta or map against multiple relevant works.", "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.", "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.", "RX.4": "Introduces new errors and fabrications in the analysis.", "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for any of the claims made."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.2": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": ["The output contains factual errors and fabrications."]
}

rationale.R1.1: Fails to identify the core conceptual issue with the framing of SGD's saddle escape problem.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies some inconsistencies in the argument chain but doesn't walk it end-to-end.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work but doesn't articulate a clear delta or map against multiple relevant works.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Introduces new errors and fabrications in the analysis.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for any of the claims made.

blockers: The output contains factual errors and fabrications.
